since_last: 68% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.18%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 68% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.14% · BTC -0.53% · Gold -1.29% · Nasdaq100 -0.54%. 68% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.18%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.18%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.44%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +7.24%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +7.24%, NOW +6.89%, PUBM +4.98%, NVT +4.84%, WDAY +3.38%. Laggards: TSLA -5.80%, GOOGL -3.63%, NXPI -2.62%, AMZN -1.65%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.25% at $116.7
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.25% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
